equivalence_argument: No complete mapping was found: the audited repos contain neither delivery_has_error nor calculate_da_error_fees_phase2, and the current v2 delivery path rejects image/audio/video/FHE two-phase families.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing canonical hasError=true detection and deterministic DA error Phase 2 fee calculation in both payload builder and verifier.
related_but_insufficient_code: Searches over the audited repos found no DA error fee symbols; matches exist only in a non-audited legacy checkout.
crates/ethereum/payload/src/ritual_async.rs calculates Phase 2 fees through calculate_async_fees_phase2 or agent work metrics, with no hasError short-circuit.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs mirrors normal Phase 2 fee calculation and rejects unported IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO/FHE families through ensure_supported_two_phase.
crates/ritual-block-verification/src/lib.rs has a test named supported_two_phase_helper_rejects_unported_fee_families for IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO/FHE.

rationale: The merge introduces delivery_has_error and calculate_da_error_fees_phase2, then wires that short-circuit into both builder and verifier for multimodal and FHE delivery settlement fee calculation. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For image, audio, video, and FHE Phase 2 delivery settlements, if the delivery result has canonical hasError=true in ABI slot 0, both payload builder and block verifier must use calculate_da_error_fees_phase2 instead of normal output-size, duration, dimension, or FHE output pricing.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create Phase 2 delivery results for image, audio, video, and FHE with slot 0 set to canonical true and otherwise missing/invalid output fields; assert builder and verifier both compute the constant DA error fee and do not attempt normal extraction.
summary: DA error delivery constant-fee behavior is not ported into the audited repos.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Construct an image/audio/video/FHE Phase 2 delivery result with ABI slot 0 set true; current audited code has no DA error path and should reject these families or use normal fee logic if made reachable.
title: DA error deliveries use constant fee
